_comment: Contact section data (Milestone 15, section #contact). Edit any value below to update the phone number, emails, address, hours, GPS coordinates, or social links shown on the homepage — index.html never hardcodes any of it, and assets/js/modules/contact-info.js only reads and renders whatever is in this file. The WhatsApp link is generated automatically from 'phone' (assets/js/modules/contact-info.js strips spaces/+ to build the wa.me URL) — there is no separate WhatsApp number to maintain.
_gps_comment: Placeholder for now (no confirmed coordinates yet) — not rendered in the Contact section until a real value is set here; the Google Maps section (a future milestone) will use this same field.
